name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Bars (2)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Beat peanut butter, sugar and eggs in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
3. Reserve 1 cup of the peanut butter mixture; set aside.
4. Melt 4 squares of chocolate. Add to the peanut butter mixture in the bowl and mix well.
5. Press into an ungreased 13 x 9 inch pan. Top with reserved peanut butter mixture.
6. Bake for 30 minutes or until edges are lightly browned.
7. Melt the remaining 4 squares of chocolate and spread evenly over the entire surface.
8. Sprinkle with peanuts.
9. Cool in the pan until chocolate is set. Cut into bars.
Makes about 24 bars.
